case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST, AS TRUSTEE VS. JUDE M. DELGADO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST, AS TRUSTEE SERVED JUL-09-2009, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, JUDE M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST, AS TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADO, JUDE M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 330 LOS PALMOS DRIVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
